title: Mixed Archive PDF Mini Fixture
capture_note: Checked-in ZIP probe for Stories 221 and 223. It packages one repo-owned flat born-digital PDF member, one maintained plain-text `.eml` fixture, one maintained static HTML snapshot, and one intentionally unsupported plain-text member so the bounded mixed-archive seam can prove archive-relative provenance plus a member-local approved-handoff launch into the maintained born-digital PDF recipe.

members.notes: This member now uses the maintained approved-handoff launch seam inside archive routing. The route row should point to the emitted intake plan artifact, write a member-local `intake_handoff_v1` sidecar, and launch the recommended born-digital PDF recipe.
The ZIP keeps only the HTML member so the bounded probe exercises one blocked unsupported file rather than counting an extra `.source.json` sidecar member.

members.source: repo-authored member embedded only in the ZIP fixture
members.notes: This unsupported text member exists to prove explicit blocked routing on the bounded mixed-archive PDF-member slice.

supported_scope: archive-relative member manifest and route rows
member-local approved-handoff launch intake for one repo-owned born-digital PDF member
suffix-based routing into existing maintained direct-entry recipes for the `.eml` and HTML members
explicit blocked rows for unsupported members
known_gaps: No scanned or handwritten archive-contained PDF-member launch
No nested archives or attachment extraction
No broad mixed-archive normalization into a single combined bundle
